text.title: Stripe Webhook Hardening Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: 90-day rotation + 5-min tolerance + WAF cap
example.note: Tolerance 300s; secret rotated quarterly via dual-secret window; raw bytes verified in FastAPI middleware; Cloudflare rate-limit at 200 rpm per IP; failed verifies streamed to Loki with 180d retention. Owner: ruslan@faion.net.

example.title: 1y secret, parsed body, no audit
example.note: Tolerance 3600s; secret in plain env for 1 year; FastAPI parses body before verify; no edge limit; no audit. Forged event accepted; ops only learned via Stripe support ticket.
